race.comment: SWEATBAND (6) finished 0.6 lengths from the winner in fifth last start over 1200m at Echuca, an improvement on his first-up sixth at Swan Hill the run before. Can improve again and prove hard to hold out. SPECKY BOY (5) is yet to break through after 14 starts but not far off a win. Placed two back then missed the frame but was thereabouts last time over 1800m at Casterton. Blinkers are added this time and can improve. RENEGE (4) has been out of the money in recent runs including last time out when fourth over 1200m at this track nine days ago. Fitter and in the mix. FLYING SHELBY (3) drew out and pushed forward early but weakened out of it late when sixth over 1350m at Donald last time. Could be ready to peak third-up.
